author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Implementation done. Split AgentConfig identity from session-role: added AgentRole enum (Driver default, Agent). AgentConfig::init keeps driver semantics; new init_with_role(Agent) used by agent init + bootstrap. Python is_agent_context reads role and only returns True on role=agent (plus .claude/worktrees/ cwd signal preserved). Legacy/malformed agent.json defaults to driver (safe). Verified end-to-end against work-check.py: no-agent-json + role=driver + legacy-no-role + malformed all block git push (exit 2), role=agent allows (exit 0). 1697 lib tests pass including 5 new role tests. Drive-by: fixed flaky identity proptest that could generate Windows-reserved names validate() rejects.
